catalog_content:
Item Name: Tres Pontas Cold Pressed, Hand Picked and Single Farm Sourced Extra Virgin Olive Oil - 500 ml (500 ml) Bullet Point 1: Gourmet Chilean olive oil – Sourced exclusively from our single-family farm in the Casablanca Valley, Chile. Cold-pressed and bottled immediately after harvest, delivering a true farm-to-table experience. Bullet Point 2: Our farm in Chile practices Sustainable Farming to ensure that the soil and environment around our olive trees will be healthy and productive for generations to come with no negative impacts on the greater community. Bullet Point 3: All of our olive oil is first cold pressed in Chile and bottled there immediately after harvest Bullet Point 4: Farm-to-Table Traceability – Each bottle features a QR code that launches a Google Earth satellite image of the exact orchard where the olives were grown, offering full transparency. Bullet Point 5: Clarifying the Labeling – While the label may reference multiple countries due to a general packaging template, please note that this olive oil is 100% from Chile—cold-pressed and bottled exclusively at our farm. Product Description:

Três Pontas Extra Virgin Olive Oil has a distinctive and well-balanced flavor since it comes from one of the few olive orchards situated in the chilly environment of Chile's Casablanca Valley. 

To ensure that the soil and ecosystem around our olive trees will be healthy and productive for many generations to come with no adverse effects on the larger community, our farm in Chile conducts sustainable farming. A single farm uses the first cold press to create Três Pontas Extra Virgin Olive Oil, which refers to oil extraction using natural methods (pressure) without the use of chemicals or heat. 

Value: 1.0 Unit: Count
product_name: Cold Pressed, Hand Picked and Single Farm Sourced Extra Virgin Olive Oil
overall_summary: Premium gourmet olive oil positioned as a high-end, farm-to-table product with sustainable farming practices and traceability via QR code. The USDA Organic certification and single-farm sourcing justify a higher price point. The 500 ml plastic bottle suggests a balance between quality and practicality for everyday use.
